/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Warehouse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Route.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/SupplyChainNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Algorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/planner.dir/src/Dijkstra.cpp.o -o planner
